name: octopus-tariff-check
description: Browser-only tool to compare Octopus Energy's Flexible and Agile tariffs against your real billing history, using real historical rates.

scripts.test: node tests/extract_module.js && node tests/test_core_logic.js && node tests/test_e2e.js && node tests/test_runcomparison.js && node tests/test_realistic_period.js && node tests/test_remember_me.js
scripts.build:v3: npm --prefix app-v3 run build && npm --prefix app-v3 run verify
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:v3 && npm run build:v3 && git diff --exit-code -- v3/ && npm run test:e2e
